title: Leading Tax Lawyer, Corinne Grigoriu, Joins McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group as Partner
content:
## Leading Tax Lawyer, Corinne Grigoriu, Joins McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group as Partner
We are pleased to welcome Corinne Grigoriu as a Partner in the Firm’s National Tax Group, based in our Calgary office. Corinne’s arrival continues the exceptional growth and momentum for our national tax planning practice, and reinforces our position as Canadian market leaders in tax law.
Highly regarded for her broad and deep expertise, Corinne advises clients on the tax aspects of complex domestic and cross-border mergers and acquisitions, private equity investments, inbound and outbound investment and financing, and corporate reorganizations and restructurings. She has deep experience in providing counsel to clients in oil & gas, mining, renewable energy and technology. She has particular expertise working with Indigenous groups on the development, implementation and financing of Indigenous partnerships and structuring Indigenous economic development activities and governance, and works with industries to facilitate Indigenous equity and economic participation in the energy sector.
A passionate voice in legal and business communities, Corinne is a member of the Canadian Tax Foundation, the International Fiscal Association, and the Canadian Petroleum Society. She is also a frequent presenter and author on tax law, appearing at industry seminars and authoring a chapter in The Law of Indigenous Ownership and Projects , a resource focused on legal considerations for Indigenous-owned projects.
“Corinne is an outstanding addition to our National Tax Group. She has a deep understanding of Western Canada’s business environment and the tax considerations that underpin major projects in the region,” said Brett Anderson , Co-Head of the National Tax Group , and Managing Partner, Alberta Region.
“Corinne’s arrival further strengthens our national tax team,” added Raj Juneja , Co-Head of the National Tax Group . “Her experience advising on the tax structuring of Indigenous‑owned and Indigenous‑partnered projects meaningfully enhances our ability to support equity participation and deliver tailored solutions for clients involved in the many major infrastructure and energy projects across Canada.”
“I’m pleased to join McCarthy Tétrault and work alongside such a strong, collaborative tax team,” said Corinne Grigoriu . “The Firm’s national platform and integrated approach create an exceptional environment to support clients through complex tax matters, and I look forward to contributing to the continued strength of the practice.”
McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group is distinguished by the range and depth of its capabilities. In addition to Corinne, we have recruited several creative and well-recognized practitioners in the last five years, allowing us to expand and deepen our offering across Canada to provide clients with the full range of advisory, transactional and litigation services.
McCarthy Tétrault’s tax expertise and knowledge of Canada’s tax regime are widely recognized. Our team is distinguished by its winning combination of exceptional experience in tax law planning and in tax disputes, making us a formidable presence in the courtroom and the boardroom. Helping clients navigate the tax aspects of domestic and cross-border public and private mergers and acquisitions, corporate reorganizations, financings and securitizations, and other transactions, we bring clarity and pragmatism to complicated tax issues that could otherwise derail business goals. Our expertise encompasses the entire gamut of tax controversies, concerning audits, requests for information, objections, searches and seizures and appeals. In working with us, clients gain a team with experience on some of the most complex tax issues and precedent-setting cases across the country. Learn more about our National Tax Group .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
- Corinne Grigoriu Partner People.Offices.Singular Calgary
